text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Fan Fest, and a special new
shop has opened up at Tracen Academy for the
occasion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ting-a-ling!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Welcome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a cozy pop-up coffee shop that'll be open for
one day only.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting, Trainer... This is my
specially roasted Manhattan blend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Go ahead, try it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There aren't any. It's this serenity that makes the
shop so comfortable. What's more...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No one can find it anyway. Even if they do, the
entrance will only lead them straight out through
the exit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Manhattan Cafe is distorting the
boundaries of space and time. I'm not sure why
she opened this shop though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ting-a-ling!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... That smells amazing! I just knew there had to be a cafe around here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, I didn't know this was your place, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new customer is Special Week, a cheerful
racer from Hokkaido.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hmm, gimme a "Super-Duper Creamy Coffee"!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...O-okay. But... I must ask you, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: How did you... enter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh... I just smelled something amazing, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Something... amazing? I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe might sound like she's accepted
the explanation, but the suspicious look she's
giving Special Week says otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting, here's your large Viennese
coffee. I'll just place it here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's so much cream on top! All righty, I'll
knock this back, then go give the Fan Fest and
my spring races ev'rything I got!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Spe? Which spring races... are you going to
enter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh, you wanna know about my schedule? Well, I got a bunch of ideas, but there's this one race I gotta run in...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And that's the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho... I knew it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe will be running in that race too.
Is that somehow related to Special Week showing
up at this cafe?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This must be a sign... Our rivalry is what led you
here...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Spe... I'll be racing too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm also entering the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're entering too, Cafe? G-guess that
means I've got some steep competition, huh.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hrmm. In that case, I'd better put my power-up
plan into action right now! Time for my signature
move!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What... signature move?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Cafe! Gimme all the desserts on the menu! And
that includes the milk-flavored macaron and the
apple custard!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gimme all ya got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is she looking to... boost her stamina? Special
Week goes on to polish off everything she asked
for, down to the last bite.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think I'm in trouble...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, I have a more pressing concern...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She scarfed down all that food without a care in
the world. I had no idea you could get stronger
that way...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can't lose... I just can't...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This cozy pop-up cafe is open for one day only...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet the barista in charge has other things on her
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ting-a-ling!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The doorbell rings unexpectedly, and in comes a
clamoring crowd of customers.

text_block_list.name: Man
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this has to be the place—the coffee shop
Manhattan Cafe opened up!

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely atmosphere! And the interior is just
as wonderful as you'd expect! Oh, I'm such a big
fan of hers.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, it seems that way... But... I wonder how?
choice_data_list:
It just goes to show how passionately they were
searching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her recent efforts, Manhattan Cafe's
popularity is starting to soar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like her fame is what drew in her fans.
And...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Gee whiz, this place is as bustling as a hive of
bees! There's no way Cafe will be able to manage
this shop on her lonesome.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey, I'm going to chip in! Boss, we need a
lemon squash, a milkshake, and some homemade
napolitan spaghetti on the double!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hey... I never agreed to any of this. I'm not
your butler.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Geez. Don't come crying to me if you get burned.
If you know what you're getting into, though... I
guess I'll play along.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... My concept for the cafe... It's...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose it's nice to be popular
sometimes. If the alternative is the place staying
empty every year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With so many fans and Umamusume coming to
see Manhattan Cafe, the shop is a huge success.
